key.name: max-notifications
key.description: The maximum number of notification banners to display stacked on screen at the same time. Additional notifications wait in a queue and appear as visible ones disappear. A value of 1 reproduces the default GNOME behaviour of showing one banner at a time.

key.name: horizontal-alignment
key.description: Horizontal position of notifications on screen.

key.name: vertical-alignment
key.description: Vertical position of notifications on screen.

key.name: notification-layout
